primary_drivers: Critical stability and revenue metrics degrading. Immediate rollback recommended to prevent further user impact.

risk_register.description: API latency p95 severely elevated (pre: 201.33ms -> post: 394.34ms). Exceeds 250ms target.
risk_register.impact: Poor UX, timeout cascades, downstream service degradation
risk_register.mitigation: Optimize database queries. Add caching layer.

risk_register.description: Support ticket volume surging (pre: 47.14 -> post: 125.57 daily). Team may be overwhelmed.
risk_register.mitigation: Activate overflow support. Deploy auto-response for known issues.

risk_register.description: 4 metrics degrading simultaneously. Compounding effects likely - crashes cause support surge, which increases churn.
risk_register.impact: Cascading failure across stability, revenue, and retention
risk_register.mitigation: Consider full rollback to break the chain.

assumption_challenges.challenge: High adoption + high crash rate means MORE users hit bugs. Adoption without stability is a liability.
assumption_challenges.evidence_needed: Crash rate segmented by Smart Insights adopters vs non-adopters

assumption_challenges.challenge: DAU increase could be curiosity-driven, not sustained value.
assumption_challenges.evidence_needed: Cohort retention analysis for Smart Insights adopters

assumption_challenges.challenge: Disabling animated charts degrades the feature value proposition.
assumption_challenges.evidence_needed: Percentage of crash-affected users who applied workaround

assumption_challenges.challenge: Satisfied users may not yet have encountered device-specific bugs.
assumption_challenges.evidence_needed: Device/OS segmentation of positive vs negative feedback

actions.action: Deploy status page update and user communications
Root cause analysis for Android 13 crashes
Audit all payment transactions post-launch for failures/double-charges
Prepare hotfix branch with crash fix + latency optimization
Review and respond to all 1-star app store reviews
Prepare re-launch plan with gated rollout (10% -> 50% -> 100%)

internal_communications.message: War room decision: Feature rollout paused/rolled back. Priority hotfix sprint initiated.
Prepare for increased inbound. Talking points and known issue guide attached.
Launch status update: Decision to pause/rollback due to stability concerns. Recovery plan in progress.
Feature launch update - temporary pause while we address user-reported issues.

external_communications.message: We have identified issues with our latest update and are actively working on fixes. We apologize for the inconvenience.
We are aware of stability issues in our recent update and are prioritizing fixes. Your experience matters to us.

social_media_response.action: Respond to negative mentions with acknowledgment and status page link
Post developer response to 1-star reviews acknowledging the issue

support_team_guidance: Acknowledge the issue immediately - do not deflect
Provide workaround for crash issues: disable animated charts in Settings > Display
For payment failures: advise retry after 30 seconds; escalate double-charges to billing team immediately
Log all contacts with issue category tags for tracking
Escalate any cancellation threats to retention team

would_increase_confidence: A/B test data comparing feature-on vs feature-off cohorts
Payment failure correlation with specific payment methods
Real-time server logs for past 6 hours
User session replay data for crash scenarios

user_impact.detail: 45.0% negative sentiment. Users reporting crashes, payment failures, and performance issues.

evidence_requested: Crash rate by device type and OS version
Payment failure rate by time of day and method
Funnel drop-off analysis for Smart Insights
Server-side error logs from past 48 hours
A/B comparison if control group exists

rollback_readiness.mechanism: If critical issues arise, rollback to v4.1.9 is available via feature flag `smart_insights_enabled=false`. Database migrations are backward-compatible.
